ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the game was played */,
  "day_num" INTEGER /* Day number of the season the game was played */,
  "wteam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "wscore" INTEGER /* Score of the winning team */,
  "lteam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the losing team */,
  "lscore" INTEGER /* Score of the losing team */,
  "wloc" TEXT /* Location of the game (N for neutral, H for home, A for away) */,
  "num_ot" INTEGER /* Number of overtime periods in the game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the arena where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_lteam_id FOREIGN KEY ("lteam_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_wteam_id FOREIGN KEY ("wteam_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division within the conference */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach (foreign key to the coaches table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Player's height in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Player's hometown */,
  "year_in_school" TEXT /* Year in school (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore, Junior, Senior) */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted (if applicable) */,
  "injured" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player is currently injured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, player, fan, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., basic, premium, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)
column_names: Season in which the game was played

Location of the game (N for neutral, H for home, A for away)
Number of overtime periods in the game
Name of the arena where the game was played

Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed)
ID of the coach (foreign key to the coaches table)
ID of the team the player belongs to
Year in school (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore, Junior, Senior)
Year the player was drafted (if applicable)
Boolean indicating if the player is currently injured
Role of the user (e.g., coach, player, fan, admin)
Date and time the user account was created
Date and time of the user's last login
Boolean indicating if the user account is active
Level of access (e.g., basic, premium, admin)
ID of the team the coach belongs to
